message:
Fix gt dog dispatch --plugin not starting dog session

The dispatch command assigned work and sent mail but never started the
dog's tmux session, so the dog couldn't read its mail. This caused
repeated escalations from dogs reporting empty hooks and inboxes.

Add EnsureRunning() call after mail send, matching what DispatchToDog()
in sling_dog.go already does correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
